name: Subaru Sato
description:
She is a young female driver who admires to be a driver in MFG one day. She is a massive fan of last year's 2nd place driver Kanata Katagiri, claiming him to be the inspiration behind her goal of becoming an MFG driver.

In her free time she regularly runs the Akina pas.

Trivia

She is the niece of Mako Sato from Initial D.

The kanji used for her first name, 昴, is also used for the Pleiades star system.

The Pleiades star system was also chosen as the brand name of the car manufacturing company, Subaru, to reflect the origins of the brand as the joining of five companies, thus the six stars are also reflected in the brand's logo.
creator: SerialDesignationN
